arts.ttl: Bove agrees to Internal defibrillator: Career in Italy ends, contract discussions with Roma loom
arts.sum: Edoardo Bove, the young Fiorentina midfielder, has reluctantly consented to undergo surgery for an internal defibrillator implant, a decision that will effectively end his playing career in Italy.
